pattern: A greedy single pass mutates a contiguous run only while each digit strictly grows, stopping the moment a mutation would shrink a digit.
hints: You may mutate at most one contiguous block; mutating a digit helps only if it makes that digit larger.
Scan left to right and start mutating at the first position where the mapped digit is bigger than the original.
Once you have started mutating, continue while the mapped digit is greater-or-equal, but stop immediately when a mapped digit would be smaller, since the block must be contiguous.

edge_inputs.description: mutate a single leading digit upward
equal mapping mid-run must not stop the block, but a decrease must
run continues over equal-valued maps then stops on a decrease

stress.description: long random digit string with a random change map
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    num = ''.join(str(rng.randrange(0, 10)) for _ in range(n))
    change = [rng.randrange(0, 10) for _ in range(10)]
    return [num, change]
